summary: Comprehensive unit test suite with excellent organization and clear fixtures. Covers all major retention policies (age, size, keep-latest-N), policy interactions, dry-run mode, and error scenarios. Well-structured with readable test names and sensible test data. Weaknesses: missing boundary condition tests (e.g., artifacts exactly at MaxAgeDays cutoff, cumulative size exactly at cap), no tests for all-delete or all-retain scenarios, and limited JSON parsing edge cases (malformed JSON, datetime parsing failures). Would catch most regressions in core logic but could be stronger on corner cases.
